ethereum classic web3 secured by nakamoto consensus

Build Unstoppable Applications

“Existing in response to contract censorship on sister chain Ethereum™ (ETH) and to uphold and preserve the principle of Code is Law, Ethereum Classic (ETC) has proven its ability to resist censorship against all odds, and deliver the original Ethereum vision of unstoppable applications.” learn more >>

launch app

The Ethereum Classic Declaration of Independence

“Let it be known to the entire world that on July 20th, 2016, at block 1,920,000, we as a community of sovereign individuals stood united by a common vision to continue the original Ethereum blockchain that is truly free from censorship, fraud or third party interference. In realizing, that the blockchain represents absolute truth, we stand by it, supporting its immutability and its future. We do not make this declaration lightly, or without forethought to the consequences of our actions.” continue reading >>

why classic?
Buy USC

USC
Stablecoin

Sign up for an account to mint USC, Ethereum Classic’s premiere regulated stablecoin. Brale allows businesses to convert U.S. dollars and select digital assets into Ethereum Classic USD (USC). Currently, issuance and redemption of the USC digital asset is available to qualified businesses and wholesale distributors.

Mint USC

Ethereum Classic Wallets

There are many options of wallets to choose from to secure and use ETC. Each option gives a different balance between security and convenience. Please research the best option depending on your requirements.
Explore ETC Wallets

Ethereum Classic Exchanges

Ethereum Classic is widely supported in throughout the exchange space. There are many options of from trust minimized exchanges like ETCswap to centralized exchanges like Coinbase. Each exchange product gives the user a different balance between security, liquidity, and convenience.
Explore ETC Exchanges
